text:
Created attachment 246050
Update to 0.3.0

Current status:

- Builds OK: 15, 140, 132, 124 amd64 (broken on i386)
- Build fails on aarch64:

[drm-sys 0.4.0] No prebuilt bindings for target OS `freebsd` and/or architecture `aarch64`. Try `use_bindgen` feature.

Did not tried bindgen yet.
https://docs.rs/crate/drm-sys/0.5.0/source/README.md

- Run test on 15 CURRENT:

pid 36034 (lapce), jid 0, uid 1001: exited on signal 6 (core dumped)
